ai_tips: Starting out at 13m — 2.76km ahead with 30m of climbing on the profile. 从海拔13米出发——全程2.76公里，累计爬升30米。
0.24km in — pace 5:09/km as the effort builds. 进行到0.24公里——配速5:09/公里，强度正在建立。
Halfway to the high point — 0m of the 5m climb done, grade here 2.7%. Short, quick steps keep this efficient. 爬升至最高点过半——5米总爬升已完成0米，此处坡度2.7%。缩小步幅、加快步频会更省力。
High point of the route: 18m at 1.12km. From here the route mostly gives back. 全程最高点18米，位于1.12公里处。此后路线总体向下。
Steepest descent of the day: -15.9% at 1.31km — you let it flow at 6:02/km, good downhill confidence. 全天最陡的下坡：1.31公里处坡度-15.9%——你顺势加速到6:02/公里，下坡信心不错。
2.57km — late-run check: pace 10:25/km, effort showing as the pace slips. 2.57公里——后程检查：配速10:25/公里，疲劳显现，配速下滑。
Finished 2.76km in 17:01 (avg 6:10/km, +30m). Solid, steady effort end to end. 完成2.76公里，用时17:01（平均配速6:10/公里，爬升30米）。全程稳定扎实。
